outreach.diagnosis: M&B Roofing appears to have no meaningful website presence, which means search and referral traffic has nowhere strong to land. A simple, credible roofing and restoration site would likely improve trust and enquiry conversion.
outreach.specificObservation: Discord image OCR showed a roofing/restoration sign with phone 0424 371 622 and free in-person quote offer.
outreach.coldMessageAngle: Noticed there is no dedicated website experience for your roofing and restoration in Jamison Town / Greater Western Sydney, so I mocked up what a clearer first impression could look like.

buildPacket.nextAction: Use the Open Design handoff draft directly for the next build module.
